Container.Name: wyoming-parakeet
Container.Overview: [b]Wyoming Parakeet (STT)[/b] — speech-to-text via NVIDIA NeMo Parakeet-TDT 0.6B v2 running on CPU through ONNX Runtime, exposed over the Wyoming protocol so Home Assistant can use it as a Speech-to-Text engine. [br] [b]Model downloads on first run[/b] (~600 MB). With int8 quantization the footprint is smaller and CPU inference is significantly faster — set quantization in the [i]Model Quantization[/i] field (default int8). [br] [b]To use in Home Assistant:[/b] Settings → Devices & services → Add integration → [i]Wyoming Protocol[/i] → host = Unraid IP, port = 10300.
Container.Description: CPU-only ONNX implementation of NVIDIA NeMo Parakeet-TDT 0.6B v2, served over the Wyoming protocol. Pairs with any Wyoming TTS (e.g. Piper) behind Home Assistant Assist.

Config.Name: Wyoming Port
Config.Description: Wyoming protocol TCP port — Home Assistant Wyoming integration connects here (tcp://UNRAID-IP:10300).

Config.Name: Model Cache
Config.Description: ONNX model cache. Models auto-download on first run (~600 MB). Cache pool recommended for SSD speed on reloads.
